goal: Pull the directory layout of the Karaoke Hero project for a detailed codebase review.

plan_steps.description: List all files in the Karaoke Hero project directory.
acceptance_criteria: A comprehensive list of all files and directories within the Karaoke Hero project is generated.

plan_steps.description: Identify and categorize the main components (e.g., frontend, backend, tests) in the directory layout.
acceptance_criteria: Main components are clearly identified and categorized based on their roles within the project.

plan_steps.description: Analyze the structure of each main component to understand its subdirectories and files.
acceptance_criteria: A detailed breakdown of the structure for each main component is provided, including key subdirectories and files.

plan_steps.description: Identify any third-party libraries or dependencies used in the project.
acceptance_criteria: A list of all third-party libraries and dependencies, along with their versions, is compiled.

plan_steps.description: Document any notable files or directories that are critical for the project's operation.
acceptance_criteria: A document detailing critical files and directories, including their purpose and importance, is created.

spoken_summary: Looks like I didn't get any steps executed — the directory pull didn't run. Can you confirm the Karaoke Hero project path exists and I have permission to access it?
